grading_results.text: Recommends a specific backend (Ollama, llama.cpp, etc.)
grading_results.evidence: Recommends 'Option 1: Ollama (Recommended - Easiest)' with clear explanation
Provides multiple installation methods: Ollama curl, LM Studio, Hugging Face Transformers, vLLM
Includes 'Configuration Tips for RTX 4090' section with optimal settings and quantization options
Includes integration with Continue.dev and Aider for coding, mentions llama3.2:3b-instruct for coding
